meta.title: Potentiation of the Neutralization of Feline Leukaemia Virus in Hypotonic Medium

abstractHtml:
The neutralization of feline leukaemia virus could be enhanced by performing the reaction in hypotonic medium. Absorption of antibody by virus specific antigens was also made more sensitive under these conditions.

* Present address: ICRF Tumour Immunology Unit, Department of Zoology, University College London, Gower Street, London WC1E 6BT.
